assumptions: the first commercial flow should focus on one hero product
checkout friction must stay very low
risks: too many steps may reduce conversion
scan flow may fail if guidance is unclear
primary_user_goal: Complete a smart footwear scan and purchase with minimal friction.
ux_recommendation: Keep the flow to one hero product, one guided scan path, and one fast checkout path with minimal text and strong visual cues.
next_design_step: Create a screen-by-screen mobile flow for the first ZILFIT customer journey.
